site.name: NordHjem
site.description: Curated Scandinavian-inspired furniture and home décor, crafted with simplicity and warmth.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Find exactly what you're looking for
home.brandStoryText: NordHjem was born from a love of Scandinavian simplicity. We believe your home should be a sanctuary — filled with pieces that are beautiful, functional, and built to last.

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.body: This placeholder privacy policy explains how we may collect, use, and protect customer information when you browse or purchase from NordHjem. The final legal text will be provided by our legal team.

data.title: 2. Information We Collect
data.body: We may collect account details, order history, shipping information, and customer support messages. This placeholder section is for demonstration only and will be replaced with complete disclosures.

contact.title: 3. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions about privacy practices, please contact our support team through the official contact channel listed on the website.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By using this website, you agree to these placeholder terms. The definitive legal language will be updated in a later release.

usage.title: 2. Account and Usage Rules
usage.body: Users should provide accurate account details, use the platform responsibly, and comply with all applicable laws. This is sample content for layout and localization purposes.

liability.title: 3. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: NordHjem is not liable for indirect or incidental damages to the fullest extent permitted by law. This section is placeholder copy and not final legal advice.

methods.title: 1. Shipping Methods
methods.body: We offer standard and expedited shipping options based on destination and product availability. Available methods are shown at checkout before payment is completed.

deliveryTimes.title: 2. Delivery Times
deliveryTimes.body: Estimated delivery times vary by region and shipping method. Orders are typically processed within 1–2 business days, and transit times are provided as estimates only.

costs.title: 3. Shipping Costs
costs.body: Shipping fees are calculated at checkout according to destination, package size, and selected delivery speed. Promotional free-shipping offers may apply when eligible.

international.title: 4. International Shipping
international.body: We ship to selected international destinations. Customs duties, taxes, and import fees are the responsibility of the recipient unless otherwise stated at checkout.

tracking.title: 5. Order Tracking
tracking.body: Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with tracking details. Tracking updates may take up to 24 hours to appear after carrier pickup.

eligibility.title: 1. Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refund requests may be accepted for eligible items within a defined period after delivery. Specific eligibility conditions will be finalized in the official policy.

process.title: 2. Refund Request Process
process.body: Customers can submit a refund request with order details and reason for return. Our support team will review and respond according to the final policy terms.

timing.title: 3. Processing Time
timing.body: Approved refunds are typically processed to the original payment method within several business days, depending on banking timelines.
